channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Bluesky's next product is an AI assistant that helps build custom social media feeds
item.description: Bluesky is the latest social media platform to throw its hat into the AI chatbot ring. Bluesky, but specifically its chief innovation officer Jay Graber and her new Exploration team, built a new AI assistant called Attie that's designed to help users create custom feeds. Graber called Attie an "agentic social app" that's built on its its open-source framework called the AT Protocol. To use Attie, users can punch in prompts in natural language to generate social feeds without having to know how to code. On the Attie website, examples include prompts like, "Show me electronic music and experimen...

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon's third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until […]

item.title: Sora’s shutdown could be a reality check moment for AI video
item.description: Is this just normal corporate strategy, or are we about to see a broader pullback on AI-generated video?

item.title: AMC Puts a Stake in ‘Talamasca’ After One Season
item.description: The Immortal Universe will continue on without 'Talamasca,' but some of its characters may migrate to other shows.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: When a robotaxi has to call 911
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra vs Google Pixel 10 Pro XL : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme ?
item.description: Si Google produit d'excellents smartphones, il peine toujours à se démarquer sur le segment du très haut de gamme. Le Pixel 10 Pro XL peut-il seulement rivaliser avec un Xiaomi 17 Ultra plus conquérant que jamais ?

item.title: Comment optimiser la durée de vie votre batterie sur Mac ?
item.description: La mise à jour 26.4 de macOS Tahoe apporte enfin deux fonctionnalités attendues depuis longtemps sur Mac : la limite de recharge et la recharge optimisée. Voici comment les activer.

item.title: I test new vacuums every month. Here are the robot vacuum deals worth buying in Amazons Spring Sale.
item.description: Newly released 2026 robot vacuums are on sale for Amazon's Big Spring Sale, like the Eufy C28 and Roborock Qrevo Curv 2 Flow.

item.title: Weve found the best AirPods deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — $99 AirPods are still live
item.description: We found the best AirPods deals to shop during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab AirPods 4 for $99, and save $60 on AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: Ce nouveau smartphone Oppo ultra-résistant et à l’autonomie XXL vient de sortir et tombe déjà à moins de 250 €
item.description: Avec son A6 5G, Oppo mise sur la durabilité avec un smartphone qui affiche une solide batterie de 6 550 mAh. Carrefour retire 30 euros à la version 256 Go de ce smartphone qui tombe à 239 euros.

item.title: Were tracking the best Apple deals in the Amazon Spring Sale — new lows on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: 'A career can be just as strong in these fields of plumbing and electricians': Blackrock boss says getting an AI job shouldn't be the end goal for everyone
item.description: Larry Fink urges society to value skilled trades as AI reshapes jobs, warns that energy costs and oil risks threaten economies.

item.title: Aqara Smart Lock U400 Review: Hands-free Unlocking at Its Best
item.description: Aqara’s newest smart lock gets universal tap-to-unlock, but only iPhones and Apple Watches let you skip that step and just walk on in.

item.title: Can my favorite Game Boy gadget tell fake cartridges from real?
item.description: The $50 Epilogue GB Operator has a brand-new trick up its sleeve. In addition to backing up Game Boy, Game Boy Color and Game Boy Advance cartridges and saves to a PC, it can now plug into your phone with a brand-new Retrace app for Android and iOS. The idea: check if cartridges are legit, […]

item.title: Im a tech editor. I found 45+ tech deals Id actually buy in the Amazon Big Spring Sale.
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.
